Attributes.Description: Short name used to refer to the apartment building.
Full official name of the apartment building.
Description of the apartment building, such as the type of units it offers.
Physical address of the apartment building.
Name of the manager responsible for the apartment building.
Contact phone number for the apartment building or its manager.
Gender of the guest.
First name of the guest.
Last name of the guest.
Date and time of birth of the guest.
Status code indicating the booking status (e.g., provisional, confirmed).
Start date and time of the booking period.
End date and time of the booking period.
Apartment number associated with the booking.
First name of the guest who made the booking.
Last name of the guest who made the booking.
Name or code identifying a facility available in the apartment.
Apartment number where the facility is provided.
Code representing the type of apartment (e.g., Studio, One-bedroom).
Unique number identifying the apartment.
Number of bathrooms in the apartment.
Number of bedrooms in the apartment.
Total number of rooms in the apartment.
Short name of the building the apartment belongs to.
Full name of the building the apartment belongs to.
Date when the availability status of the unit was recorded.
Indicates whether the apartment is available (1 for Yes, 0 for No).
Apartment number being tracked for availability.
Start date of a booking associated with the apartment (if any).
End date of a booking associated with the apartment (if any).
